sql_array: CREATE TABLE file_sizes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, size_bytes INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE time_series (timestamp_col TIMESTAMP, data_value INTEGER);
SELECT format_bytes(MAX(size_bytes)) AS max_human_readable_size, COUNT(*) AS total_files FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes IS NOT NULL GROUP BY size_bytes HAVING total_files > 0;

SELECT t.timestamp_col, t.data_value + (SELECT COALESCE(NULL, 1) from (SELECT SUM(data_value) FROM time_series WHERE data_value IS NOT NULL)) AS adjusted_value FROM time_series t ORDER BY t.timestamp_col DESC;
SELECT format_bytes(SUM(size_bytes)) AS total_bytes FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.timestamp_col + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_series) DAY AS future_date FROM time_series t WHERE data_value > (SELECT AVG(data_value) FROM time_series) ORDER BY future_date;
WITH bytes_summary AS (SELECT format_bytes(size_bytes) AS readable_size FROM file_sizes WHERE size_bytes IS NOT NULL) SELECT readable_size FROM bytes_summary ORDER BY readable_size ASC;
SELECT t.timestamp_col, t.data_value, format_bytes(t.data_value * 1024) AS formatted_value FROM time_series t JOIN file_sizes f ON f.size_bytes > 1024 WHERE t.data_value IS NOT NULL;
